violations.detail: Healthcheck uses `curl`/`wget`, which on `ruby:*-slim`/`ruby:*-alpine` bases requires an extra `apt-get install curl` step — ~3 MiB to add a tool that's already in the image as the Ruby stdlib's Net::HTTP. Switch to the Ruby-native form to drop the dependency.
violations.message: Rails runtime image lacks HEALTHCHECK or uses curl/wget instead of Ruby stdlib Net::HTTP

suggestedFix.description: Replace the curl/wget HEALTHCHECK with the Ruby-native form (drops the apt-get install): CMD ["ruby", "-rnet/http", "-e", "exit Net::HTTP.get_response(URI('http://127.0.0.1:3000/up')).is_a?(Net::HTTPSuccess) ? 0 : 1"]
